mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_NUMB , U.PROF_NUMB , F.FILE_PATH AS PORF_PATH , U.BGIM_NUMB , BF.FILE_PATH AS BGIM_PATH , U.USER_IDXX , U.USER_NICK , U.USER_PROV , U.USER_ROLE , U.INTR_CNTN FROM TM_USERXM U LEFT JOIN TM_FILEXM F ON U.PROF_NUMB = F.FILE_NUMB LEFT JOIN TM_FILEXM BF ON U.BGIM_NUMB = BF.FILE_NUMB WHERE U.USER_IDXX = #{userIdxx}

SELECT U.USER_NUMB , U.PROF_NUMB , F.FILE_PATH AS PORF_PATH , U.BGIM_NUMB , BF.FILE_PATH AS BGIM_PATH , U.USER_IDXX , U.USER_NICK , U.USER_PROV , U.USER_ROLE , U.INTR_CNTN FROM TM_USERXM U LEFT JOIN TM_FILEXM F ON U.PROF_NUMB = F.FILE_NUMB LEFT JOIN TM_FILEXM BF ON U.BGIM_NUMB = BF.FILE_NUMB WHERE U.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb}
